name: Dotdigital Omnichannel Marketing Automation API
what_it_does: Omnichannel marketing automation platform with REST API — enabling e-commerce brands to design and automate email, SMS, push notification, and social retargeting campaigns, with deep Magento/Adobe Commerce and Shopify integrations, customer data segmentation, behavioral triggers, and dynamic content personalization for digital commerce marketing.
use_cases: Automating e-commerce email campaigns via Dotdigital API for cart abandonment and post-purchase
Managing contact lists and segments via Dotdigital API for targeted campaign automation
Triggering transactional emails via Dotdigital for order confirmation and shipping notifications
Syncing Magento/Shopify customer data via Dotdigital for behavioral email personalization
Sending SMS campaigns via Dotdigital API for omnichannel customer engagement
not_for: Developer-first email (use SendGrid or Mailgun for pure transactional email APIs)
Non-e-commerce marketing automation (Dotdigital excels in retail/e-commerce context)
Large enterprise needing Salesforce Marketing Cloud scale (use SFMC for enterprise CRM integration)
best_when: An e-commerce brand using Magento or Shopify needs marketing automation tightly integrated with their commerce platform — where Dotdigital's native connectors and behavioral triggers enable personalized omnichannel campaigns without complex custom integration.
avoid_when: You need pure transactional email API, are not in e-commerce, or need enterprise CRM-driven marketing at Salesforce scale.

auth.notes: HTTP Basic auth with API user credentials (username/password from API access panel). API user created in Dotdigital dashboard. Base64-encoded credentials in Authorization header. No OAuth2. No fine-grained scopes. Webhooks for campaign and contact events. Separate API credentials from main account login. Account-level API access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier; free trial available
pricing.notes: UK company (London). Founded 1999 (originally Ellipsis Media). Listed on AIM (London Stock Exchange, ticker: DOTD). 4,000+ customers. 70M+ emails/month. Native Magento/Adobe Commerce connector (market-leading). Shopify integration. Microsoft Dynamics 365 integration. E-commerce-first marketing automation. Products: Email, SMS, Chat, Push, Social, Surveys. Transactional email (Dotmailer was old name — now Dotdigital). GDPR by design (UK company post-Brexit, UK GDPR). Worldwide Magento/Adobe Commerce partner program. Used by: Hobbycraft, Paperchase, The Football Association.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits apply; not publicly documented

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API with HTTP Basic auth (API user credentials). Webhooks. GDPR/CCPA/ISO27001. UK public company. Annual contract. E-commerce native (Magento/Shopify). No OAuth2. Good developer documentation.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Contact reads idempotent by email address. List reads idempotent. Campaign sends not idempotent — verify before triggering. Import operations: check for existing contacts. Use contact email as deduplication key.
known_agent_gotchas: HTTP Basic auth with API user credentials — API user must be created separately from main account
API user is separate account: username/password distinct from main login credentials
Old name: Dotmailer — documentation and integrations may reference both names
UK GDPR applies (UK company post-Brexit) — consent management required for EU and UK customers
Annual contract required — no self-service API access for production
E-commerce focus: full value requires Magento/Shopify connector for behavioral data

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR, CCPA, ISO27001. UK company — UK GDPR applies (stricter than many jurisdictions). HTTP Basic auth (API user credentials). No OAuth2 scope granularity. EU/US/AU data residency. Email data (PII) requires careful GDPR handling. Publicly listed company (AIM London) — regulatory compliance obligations. Webhook signature validation available.
